title: Luminous Luscious Japanese Fish Curry
description: A bright, low‑carb Japanese fish curry that blends fresh fromage frais and ferment‑jang for a silky, savory sauce.
instructions: Pat the cod fillets dry and season lightly with salt and pepper.
Heat sesame oil in a skillet over medium heat and sear the cod for 2 minutes on each side.
Add the ginger, green onions and shiitake mushrooms, cooking until fragrant about 3 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a gentle simmer, then stir in the ferment‑jang and soy sauce.
Reduce the heat and add the tofu, allowing the curry to thicken over 5 minutes.
Fold in the fromage frais just before turning off the heat, letting it melt into a creamy sauce.
Serve the curry over cauliflower rice or steamed greens for a low‑carb finish.
Garnish with extra green onions or a drizzle of sesame oil if desired.
